settings.before_title: Dont hestitate to ask our team.

tabs.tab_title: Can I pay for my Electric Bike in parts?
tabs.tab_content: Yes, you can ride Joyor in the rain with the general slippery road precautions. Do not ride or place the scooter anywhere with a water level higher then 5cm, in order to avoid potential damage of the battery and other parts, Electric scooter models with big 10″ wheels X and Y are more stable on the slippery roads than electric scooter models with smaller wheels H1, A and series. You can check other Joyor electric scooter safety instructions in the User Manual.
